items.superseding_construct: Weak<T> from std::rc — Rust's Weak reference achieves the same null-on-drop semantics via Rc/Weak reference counting
items.notes: Auto-nulling weak pointer that survives object destruction; Rust uses Rc<RefCell<T>> + Weak<T>

items.superseding_construct: assigning Weak::new() or None in Option<Weak<T>>
Rc<T> strong reference counting — Weak references are tracked by Rc automatically; no separate list needed
items.notes: Intrusive list tracking all cross-pointers to an object; Rust Rc handles this internally

items.superseding_construct: dropping Rc<T> — Weak refs automatically return None on upgrade after Rc is dropped
